title: LN8 2DF, Faldingworth Poultry Ltd: environmental permit issued - EPR/VP3925LR/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Faldingworth Poultry Ltd Installation name: George’s Farm Permit number: EPR/VP3925LR/A001  "
